items.briefing:
A ransomware group known as Inc is actively exploiting unpatched vulnerabilities in SonicWall SMA devices — remote access appliances used by many organisations. If your workplace uses SonicWall equipment, check with your IT team immediately to confirm patches have been applied. Separately, a malware campaign is targeting Mac users through fake AI chat applications impersonating Claude. Staff should only download software from official, verified sources and be cautious of unsolicited links promoting AI tools.

**Practical tip:** If you use a Mac, avoid downloading AI chat apps from unofficial websites — stick to the vendor's official page or your organisation's approved software list.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: 81% of Australian organisations already experiencing AI security incidents signals urgent need for defensive strategies.
